ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2024 Continued To Jun-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan J. Meckfessel for Ernest F. Der, Executor.

Counsel reported progress in transferring estate assets and explained that the executor experienced delays due to knee replacement surgery in October and the holidays. Mr. Meckfessel stated the four trust beneficiaries agree on a plan to sell transferred shares and condominium and to distribute proceeds via the trust. The court continued the status of close of estate hearing to June 2, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Meckfessel appeared by zoom for Ernest Der.

Mr. Meckfessel provided an oral report on status of the assets. Status on close of estate is continued to December 2, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Nov-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-26-1992 is admitted to probate. Ernest Der is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-18-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
